signals.headline: Cooper Flagg's rookie season ends prematurely with Mavericks due to ankle sprain in finale** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg's rookie season ends prematurely with Mavericks due to ankle sprain in finale** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2][3][4]

Mavericks' No. 1 pick Cooper Flagg exited Sunday's regular-season finale vs. Bulls with a left ankle sprain after 9 minutes (10 pts, 4 reb, 1 ast), ruled out for return, confirming Dallas missed playoffs and eyes draft lottery (tied 7th-8th West)[1][2][3][4]. No mentions
